data.name: Dominated by: Yandere Goth Girlfriend 4
data.detailed_description:
After your trip to the beach, Kuro, your 247cm tall yandere, goth, violent, sadistic, mentally unstable girlfriend became furious after you talked to another woman and has decided to punish you so that you'll never so much as even look at another woman. For an entire day, Kuro uses her overwhelming size and strength to torment you...or so you thought. To your complete surprise, what you thought was going to be another rage-fueled beatdown is turning out to be way more pleasurable and exciting than you would have ever thought.

  • ~3K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 19 Unique character images

  • 21 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Your 247cm tall, yandere, sadistic, violent, mentally unstable, goth girlfriend sensually punishes you for an entire day.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
